gana_horn.description: Session initialisation — bootstrap, create, resume, checkpoint, handoff

gana_neck.description: Core memory creation — create, update, import, delete, clone memories

gana_root.description: System health — health report, rust status/audit, state summary, ship check

gana_room.description: Resource locks & privacy — sangha lock, sandbox, hermit crab mode, MCP integrity, security monitor

gana_heart.description: Session context — scratchpad (create/update/finalize/analyze), handoff, context pack/status

gana_tail.description: Performance & acceleration — SIMD ops (cosine/batch), cascade execution

gana_winnowing_basket.description: Wisdom & search — search, vector search, hybrid recall, graph walk, JIT research, batch read

gana_ghost.description: Introspection & web research — gnosis, telemetry, capabilities, graph topology, surprise stats, web search/fetch, browser automation, watchers, self-model forecast

gana_willow.description: Resilience — rate limiter, grimoire spells/suggest/cast/walkthrough, oracle

gana_extended_net.description: Pattern connectivity — pattern search, cluster stats, learning, coherence boost, resonance trace

gana_wings.description: Deployment & export — export memories, audit export, mesh broadcast/status

gana_chariot.description: Archaeology & knowledge graph — archaeology (search/stats/digest), KG extract/query/top, marketplace, Windsurf conversations

gana_abundance.description: Regeneration — dream cycle (start/stop/now/status), lifecycle, serendipity, entity resolve, narrative compress, ILP payments, gratitude

gana_straddling_legs.description: Ethics & balance — ethics eval, boundaries, consent, harmony vector, wu xing balance, verification

gana_mound.description: Metrics & caching — hologram view, metric tracking, yin-yang balance, green score

gana_hairy_head.description: Detail & debug — salience, anomaly (check/history/status), otel (metrics/spans), karma report/trace/anchor/verify, dharma rules

gana_net.description: Capture & filtering — prompt render/list/reload, karma verify chain

gana_turtle_beak.description: Precision — edge/bitnet inference, edge batch, stats

gana_three_stars.description: Judgment & synthesis — bicameral reasoning, ensemble (query/history/status), optimization, kaizen analyze/apply, sabha convene/status

gana_dipper.description: Strategy — homeostasis (check/status), maturity assess, starter packs (get/list/suggest), cognitive modes

gana_void.description: Stillness & galaxies — galactic dashboard, gardens, galaxy CRUD/transfer/merge/sync/lineage/taxonomy, OMS export/import/inspect

gana_roof.description: Shelter — ollama models/generate/chat/agent, model signing/verify, sovereign sandbox (shelter create/execute/inspect/destroy)

gana_encampment.description: Community — sangha chat, broker publish/history/status, gan ying emit/history/listeners

dest_tag.description: Optional destination tag for exchange deposits

request_id.description: Optional caller-provided request id for tracing. If omitted, a UUID is generated.

idempotency_key.description: Optional idempotency key. For write tools, retries with the same key will replay prior results.

dry_run.description: If true, do not perform writes; return an execution preview when possible.

now.description: Optional ISO timestamp override for deterministic evaluation/replay (best-effort).
